subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the love of the Blessed Beauty! Bright indeed is this day, and the court of hearts is even as a rose-garden of joy and delight, for the birth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت جمال مبارک روزیست روشن و ساحت قلوب گلزار فرح و سرور زیرا بولادت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
